event_comments:
Several pieces of clothing were left behind at Putney Woods. Please email info@cascadeoc.org to inquire or claim.
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Result Status Codes
msp: missing punch
dnf: did not finish
nc: not competing
dq: disqualified
ovt: overtime
dns: did not start
<time>* indicates course completion status was not reported and may be valid, msp, or dnf
